issues_resolved: 1. Competitor Comparison showing unrelated businesses - FIXED: Now filters to only same business type (lodging/hotel)
2. Rank based on real search listings - FIXED: search_rank field from Google text search order, not computed sort
3. Target Rating should be 5 stars - FIXED: target_rating=5.0, practical_target=4.9
4. Reviews needed calculation - FIXED: Uses formula (4.9*total - current_sum)/(5-4.9)
5. View All reviews popup with share-as-PNG - FIXED: AllReviewsDialog with filters, pagination, ReviewShareCard with html2canvas
